entries.title: API Response Stream Visualizer
entries.notes: Real-time parsing and visualization of streaming responses. Easy to build with Fetch API interception. Growing trend of streaming endpoints makes this timely.
entries.pain: Debugging streaming API responses (SSE, chunked transfers) is painful with raw DevTools

entries.title: Gmail Thread Decay Detector
entries.notes: Tracks thread activity timestamps and alerts when engagement drops. Simple to build with Gmail API. Helps prevent deals from going stale.
entries.pain: Email threads go cold without sales reps noticing, losing deal momentum

entries.title: LinkedIn Connection Quality Score
entries.notes: Uses engagement signals (profile views, message responses) to score connections. Built with LinkedIn data. Differentiates from basic connection managers.
entries.pain: Sales reps have hundreds of connections but no signal on which are worth nurturing

entries.title: Browser Tab Topic Classifier
entries.notes: Uses lightweight ML to classify tab content and suggest groupings. Chrome tab groups API makes this easy. Helps with tab overload.
entries.pain: Users have dozens of tabs but no way to understand what topics they're researching

entries.title: GCP Resource Dependency Visualizer
entries.notes: Queries GCP APIs to build dependency graphs. Cloud Asset API and Resource Manager API are accessible. Essential for incident response and planning.
entries.pain: Engineers struggle to understand complex GCP infrastructure dependencies

entries.title: Conference Networking Queue Manager
entries.notes: QR code scanning to log encounters and remind about follow-ups. Easy to build with Camera API. Useful for networking-heavy events.
entries.pain: Introverts at conferences forget who they've met and miss follow-up opportunities

entries.title: Local LLM Context Injector
entries.notes: Captures page context and injects into local LLM tools. Uses content scripts. Streamlines AI-assisted development.
entries.pain: Developers manually copy-paste context from browsers into LLM prompts, breaking flow

entries.title: Meeting Room Availability Heatmap
entries.notes: Overlays all calendars and highlights optimal slots. Built with Google Calendar API. Improves meeting efficiency.
entries.pain: Scheduling meetings requires checking multiple calendars, wasting time

entries.title: README Freshness Checker
entries.notes: Monitors GitHub README timestamps and alerts when updates are needed. Uses GitHub API. Simple but valuable for team productivity.
entries.pain: Developers waste time on projects with outdated documentation

entries.title: Semantic Version Page Diff
entries.notes: Parses version numbers from pages and shows visual diffs. Built with DOM parsing. Useful for dependency management.
entries.pain: Comparing semantic versions across documentation pages is manual and error-prone

entries.title: Interactive Element Tracer
entries.notes: Logs and visualizes user interactions with page elements. Built with event listeners. Helpful for usability testing.
entries.pain: Users can't easily track what interactive elements they've engaged with on complex pages

entries.title: CSS Anchor Positioning Debugger
entries.notes: Visualizes anchor relationships and highlights positioning issues. Uses computed styles API. Streamlines CSS debugging.
entries.pain: Debugging CSS anchor positioning requires manual inspection, which is tedious

entries.title: PDF Annotation Sync
entries.notes: Syncs annotations to cloud storage and reconciles across viewers. Built with PDF.js. Essential for document collaboration.
entries.pain: PDF annotations don't sync across different viewers and devices

entries.title: Browser Extension API Call Tracker
entries.notes: Monitors API calls made by extensions and compares to manifest. Uses devtools protocol. Critical for privacy awareness.
entries.pain: Users don't know which APIs browser extensions actually use versus what they declare

entries.title: Multi-Account Session Pinning
entries.notes: Pins specific sessions while allowing normal browsing. Uses Chrome identity API. Improves multi-account workflows.
entries.pain: Managing multiple browser identities for testing is clunky and error-prone
